Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's core topics — including the definition of recursion, base and recursive cases, call stack mechanics, and classic implementations like factorial and Fibonacci — that serves as a navigational guide for learners and instructors to understand the scope and sequence of the module's content.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: A navigation page listing the topics covered in the Recursion module—including defining recursion, base cases, recursive problem-solving strategies, and implementation details—used by learners and instructors to get an overview of the module's scope and jump to specific sections.
